loconautics.configuration.title: Loconautics Config
loconautics.configuration.train.bearingA: Max speed the Bearing Axle drives a train to. -1 = use Create's train top speed.
loconautics.configuration.train.trainMax: Absolute speed cap for a train sub-level from any source. -1 = use Create's train top speed.
loconautics.configuration.train.maxBogey: Maximum Create bogeys allowed in one carriage (glued cluster). Default 2, matching Create.
ARCADE: any consist is always movable. REALISTIC: a consist over the (multiplier-scaled) max pullable mass cannot move. Mass-scaled acceleration and SU cost apply in both.
REALISTIC mode only: the x1 maximum pullable consist mass. The bearing axle gear multiplier scales this cap (and SU cost).
Floor on weight-scaled acceleration so any consist always creeps forward. Applies in both modes.
loconautics.configuration.bearing_axle.m: Divides total train mass (kpg) to get stress impact per RPM. Lower = more stress per kg.
loconautics.configuration.bearing_axle.b: Minimum stress impact even on an empty train.
